Velvoite.title: Velvoite
Velvoite.description: EU financial regulation corpus — GDPR obligations, enforcement decisions, and regulatory changes. Also provides live Finnish statute lookup (Finlex), Finnish company register (PRH), and EUR-Lex document lookup by CELEX number. Requires VELVOITE_API_KEY.

Slack.title: Slack
Slack.description: Search messages, read channels, find discussions across your workspace.

Google Drive.title: Google Drive
Google Drive.description: Search, read, and fetch documents from Google Drive.
